# SRv6.md

> The open-source knowledge base for Segment Routing over IPv6 (SRv6).

SRv6.md is a community-driven wiki covering SRv6 fundamentals, use cases, vendor implementations, hands-on labs, and RFC references.

## Docs

- [What is SRv6?](https://srv6.md/topics/what-is-srv6/)
- [SID Structure](https://srv6.md/topics/sid-structure/)
- [Network Programming](https://srv6.md/topics/network-programming/)
- [SRv6 vs SR-MPLS](https://srv6.md/topics/srv6-vs-sr-mpls/)
- [Traffic Engineering](https://srv6.md/use-cases/traffic-engineering/)
- [VPN Services](https://srv6.md/use-cases/vpn-services/)
- [Service Chaining](https://srv6.md/use-cases/service-chaining/)
- [Linux Kernel](https://srv6.md/implementations/linux-kernel/)
- [Cisco IOS-XR](https://srv6.md/implementations/cisco-ios-xr/)
- [Juniper](https://srv6.md/implementations/juniper/)
- [FRRouting](https://srv6.md/implementations/frrouting/)
- [SONiC](https://srv6.md/implementations/sonic/)
- [Containerlab Labs](https://srv6.md/labs/containerlab/)
- [GNS3 Labs](https://srv6.md/labs/gns3/)
- [RFC 8986 - SRv6 Network Programming](https://srv6.md/rfcs/rfc8986/)
- [RFC 9252 - BGP Overlay Services](https://srv6.md/rfcs/rfc9252/)
- [RFC 9256 - SR Policy Architecture](https://srv6.md/rfcs/rfc9256/)
